goals.short_name: Workers in B.C. have fair pay and safe, healthy workplaces

main_services.name: Know your rights and resolve a workplace problem
Get paid correctly and take leave when you need it
Handle the end of a job
Know your rights as a temporary foreign worker

goals.short_name: Employers meet clear obligations when hiring and managing staff

main_services.name: Hire temporary foreign workers the right way
License a staffing or recruitment business

goals.short_name: Labour relations are stable and injured workers are treated fairly

main_services.name: Navigate union certification and collective bargaining
Get help with a workers' compensation matter

acts.summary: Sets minimum standards for wages, hours, leave, termination and licensing in most B.C. workplaces. Administered by the Employment Standards Branch.

sections.title: Complaint and time limit; confidentiality
sections.description: Sets the process and time limits for filing an employment standards complaint, and allows a complainant to request confidentiality.

services.name: File an employment standards complaint
services.ms_name: Know your rights and resolve a workplace problem

services.name: Respond to an employment standards complaint or investigation
services.ms_name: Meet your employment standards obligations

services.name: File a complaint about a temporary foreign worker employer or recruiter
services.ms_name: Know your rights as a temporary foreign worker

sections.title: Publication of violators' names
sections.description: Allows the Director of Employment Standards to publish information about determinations issued for contraventions of the Act or Regulation.

services.name: Check published employment standards violations
services.ms_name: Know your rights and resolve a workplace problem

sections.title: Minimum wage and annual adjustment
sections.description: Requires employers to pay at least minimum wage and sets the annual CPI-based adjustment.

services.name: Check the current minimum wage rate
services.ms_name: Get paid correctly and take leave when you need it

sections.title: Leaves of absence
sections.description: Job-protected leaves including illness or injury, maternity and parental, family responsibility, compassionate care, critical illness, domestic or sexual violence, bereavement and jury duty.

services.name: Take job-protected leave from work
services.ms_name: Get paid correctly and take leave when you need it

sections.title: Termination of employment
sections.description: Governs notice, compensation for length of service, and temporary layoffs when employment ends.

services.name: Get notice or pay when your job ends
services.ms_name: Handle the end of a job

services.name: Understand your rights during a temporary layoff
services.ms_name: Handle the end of a job

sections.title: Group terminations
sections.description: Requires employers terminating 50 or more employees at one location within two months to give written notice to affected employees, the Minister of Labour, and any trade union.

services.name: Notify government of a group termination
services.ms_name: Meet your employment standards obligations

sections.title: Licensing of employment agencies
sections.description: Employment agencies that recruit or place workers for a fee must be licensed.

services.name: Get a licence to operate an employment agency
services.ms_name: License a staffing or recruitment business

sections.title: Licensing of talent agencies
sections.description: Talent agencies that place performers and other talent for a fee must be licensed.

services.name: Get a licence to operate a talent agency
services.ms_name: License a staffing or recruitment business

sections.title: Licensing of farm labour contractors
sections.description: Farm labour contractors who supply workers for planting, cultivating or harvesting must be licensed.

services.name: Get a licence as a farm labour contractor
services.ms_name: License a staffing or recruitment business

acts.summary: Protects temporary foreign workers from unfair recruitment and employment practices by requiring employer registration, recruiter licensing, and setting recruiter and employer obligations. Most sections in force July 8, 2019.

sections.title: Foreign worker recruiter and employer obligations
sections.description: Prohibits employers and recruiters from keeping a foreign worker's money or documents, threatening deportation without cause, or providing false or misleading information.

services.name: Know your rights as a temporary foreign worker
services.ms_name: Know your rights as a temporary foreign worker

services.name: File a complaint about a temporary foreign worker employer or recruiter
services.ms_name: Know your rights as a temporary foreign worker

sections.title: Recruiter licensing requirement
sections.description: Requires individuals who provide recruitment services for foreign workers in B.C. to hold a licence.

services.name: Check if a foreign worker recruiter is licensed
services.ms_name: Know your rights as a temporary foreign worker

services.name: Get a licence to recruit foreign workers
services.ms_name: Hire temporary foreign workers the right way

sections.title: Certificates of registration for employers of foreign nationals
sections.description: Requires employers hiring temporary foreign workers under most federal programs to hold a valid certificate of registration.

services.name: Register to hire temporary foreign workers
services.ms_name: Hire temporary foreign workers the right way

acts.summary: Governs union certification, collective bargaining, and dispute resolution between provincially-regulated employers, unions and employees. Administered by the BC Labour Relations Board.

sections.title: Union certification and collective bargaining rights
sections.description: Sets out how unions acquire collective bargaining rights, when bargaining starts, and how the Labour Relations Board mediates and adjudicates disputes.

services.name: Apply for union certification
services.ms_name: Navigate union certification and collective bargaining

services.name: Respond to a union certification or bargaining application
services.ms_name: Navigate union certification and collective bargaining

acts.summary: Governs workplace injury compensation, occupational health and safety, and the WorkSafeBC system, including the government-funded Workers' and Employers' Advisers Offices.

sections.title: Workers' Advisers Office
sections.description: Establishes the Workers' Advisers Office to provide free advice, assistance and representation to workers and dependants regarding WorkSafeBC decisions.

services.name: Get free advice on a WorkSafeBC claim decision
services.ms_name: Get help with a workers' compensation matter

sections.title: Employers' Advisers Office
sections.description: Requires government to provide workers' advisers and employers' advisers under the Act.

services.name: Get employer help with a workers' compensation claim or appeal
services.ms_name: Register and manage workers' compensation coverage

sections.title: Accident fund and employer assessment
sections.description: Governs employer registration, classification, and assessments that fund the accident fund maintained by WorkSafeBC.

services.name: Register your business for workers' compensation coverage
services.ms_name: Register and manage workers' compensation coverage
